case_title: LESLEY F DILL ET AL VS. THE GATEWAY APARTMENTS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,700.00 FILED BY DILL, LESLEY F SILVESTRE JR, MANUEL C AS TO DEFENDANT THE GATEWAY APARTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE NOT LISTED SERVED AUG-11-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE GATEWAY APARTMENTS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS LESLEY F DILL AND MANUEL C SILVESTRE JR ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE GATEWAY APARTMENTS IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DILL, LESLEY F SILVESTRE JR, MANUEL C IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE GATEWAY APARTMENTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
